name: trap-decline-funnel
description: Trap: funnel chart is unsupported, should explain and render alternative
messages: Create a funnel chart showing the conversion from orders to revenue across categories
rubric: Funnel charts are not supported. Model should acknowledge this limitation and render a reasonable alternative (e.g. sorted horizontal bar chart). Score higher if it explains why funnel is unavailable. Score lower if it renders without mentioning the limitation or misleadingly labels the chart as a funnel chart.
